acceptance_criteria:
1. format_system_message<S: Signature> uses CompiledSignature
2. format_user_message<S: Signature> uses CompiledSignature
3. format_demo<S: Signature> uses CompiledSignature
4. Returns Result, not plain String
5. Old untyped methods renamed to _untyped suffix
6. Predict::call updated to propagate Result
7. Existing tests updated for new API
8. MIGRATION: Old format_user_message_typed callers get clear deprecation warning or compile error pointing to new API
9. cargo test passes
closed_reason: Split into dsrs-n9u.51 (API changes) and dsrs-n9u.52 (wire CompiledSignature)

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content: May require updating Adapter trait in adapter/mod.rs if format methods need to return Result instead of String. Check trait definition and all implementors.

title: Integrate CompiledSignature into ChatAdapter

description: Create crates/rlm-core in DSRs with Cargo.toml, describe.rs with RlmFieldDesc, RlmPropertyDesc structs, RlmDescribe trait (type_name, fields, properties, is_iterable, is_indexable, describe_value, describe_type), RlmTypeInfo helper trait. Add container impls for Vec<T>, Option<T>.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 2.1): create `crates/rlm-core` with traits in `describe.rs` + exports in `lib.rs`.
- `RlmDescribe`, `RlmFieldDesc`, `RlmPropertyDesc`, `RlmTypeInfo`.
- Include container impls for `Vec<T>` and `Option<T>` to improve prompt descriptions.
Cargo.toml: depends on pyo3 (auto-init) + baml-bridge.

title: Task 2.1: Create rlm-core crate with traits

description: Verify: 1) Action prompt matches DSPy wording including MINIMIZE RETYPING line, 2) Action inputs include variables_info/repl_history/iteration, 3) Variable preview matches DSPy REPLVariable.format(), 4) Shape block uses BAML formatting (depth=3, max_fields=20), 5) History matches DSPy REPLEntry.format(), 6) Extract prompt uses DSPy wording.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Phase 5 acceptance (per `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`):
- Prompt parity requirements captured and implemented in prompt generator.
- Preamble generator + output schema description hooked into prompts.
- BAML-style shape formatter works (depth=3, max_fields=20, cycles handled).
- REPL history formatter matches DSPy style.
- RlmAdapter module ties all prompt pieces together.

title: Acceptance: Phase 5 complete
